cnbc.summary: The Iran war, dragging into its second month, has spiked oil and gas prices in the U.S. and around the world.

cnbc.summary: Investors headed into Monday on edge as Trump’s rejection of Iran’s ceasefire proposal fueled concerns about a prolonged Middle East conflict.

cnbc.title: With Netflix new ad-free standard plan at $20, streaming's tipping point into old TV is getting closer
cnbc.summary: The economics of streaming are nearing the point where cheaper plans with ads make as much if not more money for services like Netflix.

cnbc.title: Why one of the nation's largest auto lenders isn't worried about high vehicle prices or 'forever loans'
cnbc.summary: While median car payments have jumped from $390 to $525 since 2019, data provided by Capital One suggests stability in vehicle cost compared to income.

cnbc.title: Used car prices fall for the first time this year and EV interest rises as gas prices spike
cnbc.summary: Cox Automotive reports affordability remains a key concern for buyers and that's driving increased demand for older vehicles as well as all-electric vehicles.

cnbc.title: Alphabet's 160% rally in a year reflects value of owning 'most of the stack' in AI

cnbc.title: Retailers are on a hiring spree. But consumers are sending warning signs
cnbc.summary: The retail trades added nearly 22,000 jobs  in April, accounting for about one-fifth of total job growth.

cnbc.title: Target is trying to win back busy families from Walmart, starting with the baby aisle
cnbc.summary: Target is refreshing its baby category as part of a broader effort to offer better products and more convenience to compete with Walmart and Amazon.

cnbc.title: SEC delay on prediction markets ETFs echoes a long-fought bitcoin fund battle
cnbc.summary: The Securities and Exchange Commission has delayed approval for prediction markets ETFs, bringing up memories of the long battle over bitcoin funds.
